files.content: import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button' import { Popover, PopoverContent, PopoverDescription, PopoverHeader, PopoverTitle, PopoverTrigger, } from '@/components/ui/popover' export function Popover05() { return ( Custom width Override the default width with a utility class on PopoverContent to fit longer content or grids. ) }
